findings.explanation: Missing allowed-tools grants unlimited access. Skill needs Bash (drawio CLI, python3, git add), Read, Write/Edit for .drawio XML files. Without restriction, also gets WebFetch, MCP, etc. No malicious use detected. Recommend: allowed-tools: Bash(drawio:*), Bash(python3:*), Bash(git:add), Bash(mise:*), Read, Write, Edit
Auto-stages generated PNG files to git index. Expected behavior for pre-commit hook workflow. Only stages files the script itself generated — no arbitrary git operations.
